title: Floor 4→6 spike ratio 3.11x (target: <2x) — confirmed persistent post-fix
description: Post-fix headless sim (28000 runs) shows floor 4 avg turns 5.76, floor 6 avg turns 17.90, ratio 3.11x. Pre-fix was 3.36x. Delta: -7.4% (within 5% threshold). Issue is structural — the tool fixes did not affect boss encounter difficulty. Cluster A finding confirmed.

title: Floor 18 death rate 28.0% (was 30.2%) — confirmed persistent post-fix
description: Across all 22 profiles, floor 18 death rate dropped slightly from 30.2% to 28.0% (delta: -7.3%). Within 5% threshold — structurally unchanged. Floor 18 avg turns 27.9 vs prior 26.83. The boss wall is real and persists.

title: experienced@asc20 win rate 2% — confirmed post-fix (was 2.7%)
description: Post-fix sim with the now-correctly-applying ascension modifiers shows experienced@asc20 at 2% (1000 runs). Pre-fix was 2.7%. This is within measurement variance (smaller run count in prior test). The asc20 wall is NOT an artifact of the broken tool — it is a real gameplay issue. Cluster E finding confirmed.
note: Both values are below the 5-15% design target. Tool fix did not hide a false positive here.

title: experienced@asc15 win rate 52% (was 54.8%) — confirmed post-fix
description: Post-fix sim: experienced@asc15 = 52%, master@asc15 = 30%. Pre-fix: 54.8% / 31.3%. Delta < 5%. asc15→asc20 cliff is confirmed real (52% → 2% = 50pp drop, vs asc10→asc15 of 15pp). Structural issue.

title: volatile_core win delta -50.9% (was -53.6%) — confirmed persistent post-fix
description: Post-fix: volatile_core observational win rate 7.9% vs baseline 58.8% = -50.9% delta. Power score 0.351, floors after acq 6.5 (vs cluster avg ~16.5). Pre-fix: -53.6%. Delta between runs: -0.9pp (measurement noise). volatile_core remains severely underperforming.

title: obsidian_dice power score 0.542 (low) — potential RNG fix side effect
description: obsidian_dice was one of the CRITICAL co-op RNG fix targets. Post-fix: power score 0.542, avg floors after acq 12.1, obs win rate 49.6%. This is notably below the cluster average (~0.68). The deterministic RNG fix may have changed its expected value if the seeded path differs from the old Math.random() path. Needs monitoring.
recommendation: Run isolated obsidian_dice smoke test to confirm expected value unchanged. If deterministic seed produces different outcome than prior Math.random() calls, the balance is now different.

title: 7 leaked Docker containers from BATCH-ULTRA blocking CRITICAL-3 visual re-test
description: The BATCH-2026-04-11-ULTRA session left 7 anonymous rr-playwright containers running (great_blackwell, condescending_roentgen, amazing_noyce, confident_dhawan, reverent_hofstadter, boring_galois, kind_dijkstra). These containers collectively saturate SwiftShader GPU emulation on the host, causing cold-mode Docker tests to time out at 120s during canvas rendering. The CRITICAL-3 visual re-test is blocked by this environment pollution.
evidence: docker ps output — 7 containers Up 4 hours
fix: docker stop great_blackwell condescending_roentgen amazing_noyce confident_dhawan reverent_hofstadter boring_galois kind_dijkstra && docker rm great_blackwell condescending_roentgen amazing_noyce confident_dhawan reverent_hofstadter boring_galois kind_dijkstra
recommendation: After cleaning containers, re-run CRITICAL-3 step in a fresh session with no competing containers.

title: gym-server comboCount fix confirmed: 50 RL episodes completed, 64% win rate
description: Prior to fix: 0 episodes completed (gym-server NaN crash). Post-fix: 50/50 episodes completed with rogue_brain_v3_economy_2M model. Win rate 64%, charge rate 75.4%, charge accuracy 78%. CAVEAT: all prior training checkpoints used a broken reward signal (comboCount was always NaN), so the model's learned strategy is unreliable. The pipeline is unblocked but the model needs retraining before any strategic conclusions can be drawn.

title: scenarioSimulator.ts ascension fix confirmed: A20 playerMaxHp=75 verified
description: Prior to fix: ascension badge showed correct level but combat stats ran at A0. Post-fix: Docker visual test shows A5=68HP (A5 has no HP mult, matches A0 scaling), A15=81HP (1.15x mult applied to ~70 floor base), A20 enemy=77HP + playerMaxHp=75 (not 100). The playerMaxHp=75 is definitive proof the A20 modifier (playerMaxHpOverride: 75) is now correctly applied at bootstrap time.
